parameters.name: inAbscissaFile
parameters.help: Binary input file containing the X values (projected latitudes)

parameters.name: inOrdinateFile
parameters.help: Binary input file containing the Y values (projected longitudes)

parameters.name: inDepthFile
parameters.help: Binary input file containing the Z values (depths)

parameters.name: inValidityFile
parameters.help: Binary input file containing the validity of the soundings (1 == valid, 0 = invalid).

parameters.name: outValidityFile
parameters.help: Copy of validity file modified with the result of the filtering. Values are 0 or 1 (original valid and invalid), 2 = filtered).

parameters.name: contamination
parameters.help: The proportion of outliers in the data set. Range is ]0, 0.5].
